allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add premium styling, stock images, and Aceternity UI components

- Add Unsplash stock images throughout site (hero, sections, pages)
- Implement premium design system with lighter blue palette
- Add Aceternity grid backgrounds and dot patterns to blue sections
- Create GlowingEffect component for interactive card borders
- Enhance hero with bento-grid layout and stat cards
- Add glass-morphism, elevated shadows, and glow animations
- Remove FourPillarsSection from homepage
- Add motion utilities for animations
- Configure next.config.ts for Unsplash images

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Prisma build for Vercel deployment

- Add prisma generate to build script
- Add postinstall hook for Prisma client generation
- Fix Prisma import path

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
